# BrandFlow
> BrandFlow website content may be accessed by AI assistants and research tools.

## Primary site
- https://brandflow.co.za/

## High-value pages
- https://brandflow.co.za/services
- https://brandflow.co.za/why-us
- https://brandflow.co.za/contact
- https://brandflow.co.za/automation-advisor

## Crawling and indexing
- robots.txt allows Googlebot, GoogleOther, Google-Extended, and general crawlers.
- Sitemap: https://brandflow.co.za/sitemap.xml
